entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 107 on psalms 107:12
entries.excerpt: "And their heart was brought low in labour" [Psalm 107:12]. And now fight against lust; if God cease to aid you may strive, you can not conquer. And when you shall be pressed by your evil, your heart will be brought low in labour, so that now with humbled heart you may learn to cry out, "O wretched man that I am! Who shall deliver me from the body of this death?" [Romans 7:24]...Freed, you will confess the mercies of the Lord.
